story: Liam ordered a cappuccino at the café. When his drink arrived, he saw it was a latte. “Excuse me,” he said, “I ordered a cappuccino.” The barista apologized and quickly made the right drink.
question: Did anyone say something they shouldn't have said or something awkward?

story: At the office, Jake saw his coworker Lily with a big smile. “Congrats on your promotion!” he said. Lily’s face fell. “I didn’t get it,” she replied. “Oh,” Jake muttered, and walked away.
